issues.message: Inline style on bypasses the design system (borderRadius, width, height).
issues.suggestion: Use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns, Inset, Container) and theme tokens instead of inline styles.

issues.message: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold component.
issues.suggestion: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold layout component. Search the Marigold docs for layout alternatives.

issues.message: Inline style on <div> bypasses the design system (padding, maxWidth, margin).
issues.suggestion: Use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns, Inset, Container) and theme tokens instead of inline styles.

issues.message: Inline style "padding: 24px" on <div> (“Jane DoeActiveRole:Senior DeveloperDepar”) uses a hardcoded value instead of a design token.
issues.suggestion: Use var(--token-name) or a Marigold component prop instead of hardcoding "24px".

issues.message: Inline style "margin: 0px auto" on <div> (“Jane DoeActiveRole:Senior DeveloperDepar”) uses a hardcoded value instead of a design token.
issues.suggestion: Use var(--token-name) or a Marigold component prop instead of hardcoding "0px auto".

issues.message: Content uses only 38% of the desktop width (1280px): it stays in a narrow, mobile-shaped band instead of adapting to the available space.
issues.suggestion: Let the layout grow with the viewport using Marigold responsive primitives — <Columns collapseAt="..."> for multi-column areas, AppLayout for the shell, Stack/Inline for flow — instead of a fixed-width container. (Intentionally centred max-width reading columns are fine and may trip this; treat it as a relative signal.)

issues.message: Document should have one main landmark (landmark-one-main)
issues.suggestion: Wrap your page content in `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` to provide a `<main>` landmark. Import AppLayout from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Page should contain a level-one heading (page-has-heading-one)
issues.suggestion: Add a `<Headline level={1}>` component for the page title — it renders an `<h1>`. Import Headline from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: All page content should be contained by landmarks — 3 elements affected (region)
issues.suggestion: All page content must be inside a landmark region. Use `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` for the main area, `<TopNavigation>` for the header (`<header>`), and `<Sidebar>` for side navigation (`<aside>`). Import from `@marigold/components`.

import { Badge, Button, Card, Divider, Headline, Inline, Stack, Text, ToastProvider, useToast, } from '@marigold/components'; const ProfileCard = () => { const { addToast } = useToast(); return ( Jane Doe Active Role: Senior Developer Department: Engineering Email: jane.doe@example.com Location: Freiburg, Germany Jane is a passionate software engineer with over 8 years of experience building scalable web applications. She loves open source, clean code, and mentoring junior developers on the team. ); }; const TestApp = () => { return ( <>
); }; export default TestApp;

passed.description: Includes a profile image (img tag or image URL)
Uses layout primitives (Stack, Columns, or Inline)
No onClick on Marigold Button components
